{"id":"project-LICHEN-6km8","title":"coap_msg.c: inbox array header truncates count > 255","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_msg.c
Lines: 648-649

CBOR array header encoding truncates count to uint8_t:
```c
cbor_put_array_header(buf, &off, (uint8_t)count);
```

While LICHEN_MSG_INBOX_MAX is 8 by default, if the config changes to allow > 255 messages, the array header would advertise wrong count.

Also applies to encode_keys_list_cbor in coap_keys.c:646.

Impact: Malformed CBOR response if message count exceeds 255.

Category: CORRECTNESS - silent truncation","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:42:34.950467Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:42:34.950505Z"}
